ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dealers" (
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealer */,
  "dealer_number" INTEGER /* The unique dealer ID */,
  "dealer_name" TEXT /* The DBA dealer name */,
  "legal_name" TEXT /* The legal name of the business */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the dealer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the dealer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the dealer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the dealer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the dealer */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the dealer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealer_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dealer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shop_groups" (
  "shop_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop group */,
  "shop_group_name" TEXT /* The name of the shop group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shop group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shop_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shop_locations" (
  "shop_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop location */,
  "shop_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shop group */,
  "shop_location_number" INTEGER /* Internal # to identify store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the shop location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the shop location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the shop location */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the shop location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the shop location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the shop location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shop_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shop_locations_shop_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_group_id") REFERENCES shop_groups ("shop_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealer_shop_locations" (
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dealer */,
  "shop_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shop location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealer_id", "shop_location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the inventory item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the inventory item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the inventory item in stock */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the inventory item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Storage location of the inventory item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_items_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dealer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "shipping_city" TEXT /* Shipping city */,
  "shipping_state" TEXT /* Shipping state */,
  "shipping_zip" TEXT /* Shipping zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_dealer_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealer_id") REFERENCES dealers ("dealer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the inventory item in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., dealer, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealer_users" (
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dealer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealer_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change was made */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record where the change was made */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column where the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the column */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the inventory item in the log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., add, remove) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., placed, shipped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_logs_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
